mechanism: The combination of an uptrend triangle breakout with choppy consolidation and higher highs intact during late-month periods (week 4) suggests institutional accumulation is nearly complete, with end-of-month calendar flows providing the catalyst for continuation moves as positions are marked and rebalanced. The medium proximity to the 38.2% Fibonacci level confirms the consolidation occurred at a structurally sound retracement level where smart money typically adds to positions before the next leg up.
